relations.note: Charts and tables use uniform corners instead of the asymmetric accent shape.
Specifies diagonal orientation and per-email consistency for the accent shape.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.
**[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px.

rules.intent: Establish the signature asymmetric-radius container as the brand's core layout device.
rules.rule_text: The brand accent shape is the core container device: a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii while the other two corners keep a slight radius (accent_shape.radius, large email = 120px & 6px). It houses callout text and photography and reads modern and optimistic. Approved radius pairs — print large containers/photos = 1.25" & 0.0625", banners = 0.5" & 0.0625", small callout boxes = 0.4375" & 0.0625"; email px equivalents at 96dpi — large = 120px & 6px, banner = 48px & 6px, callout = 42px & 6px.

quotes: Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Ensure consistent accent-shape orientation across an email.
rules.rule_text: Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right) and the small (6px) radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: use the same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

quotes: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners
**Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Charts/tables get uniform rounded corners rather than the asymmetric accent device.
rules.rule_text: Exception to the accent shape: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (chart.container.radius = 12px uniform), not the asymmetric accent shape.
